div.h1: What is inside — the packages and how they connect

text.tspan: the entrypoint: parse flags, load config,
claim signals, drive the mounter, set exit code
bring up N mounts: fail fast, map
the rclone backend: map file ops
the ONLY way out: HTTPS/REST client
Guard packages (tests only — never in the binary):
internal/buildgraph asserts no object-store SDK is linked • internal/coverage enforces the coverage floor

div.p: Reading order: entrypoint → config → mounter → backend → the single outbound HTTPS egress. Green = the rclone backend. Red = the one egress. Grey = test-time guards, not shipped.
